title: gymnanthes edwalliana
intro: Gymnanthes edwalliana, also known as the Panama tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gymnanthes edwalliana include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and insect bites. Gymnanthes edwalliana can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and risks.
